question: What are the symptoms of heart failure?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "heart failure" RETURN s.name AS symptom

question: Which drugs treat tuberculosis?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "tuberculosis" RETURN dr.name AS drug

question: Which diseases share the same treatment as asthma?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug)<-[:TREATED_BY]-(d2:Disease) WHERE toLower(d1.name) CONTAINS "asthma" AND d1 <> d2 RETURN d2.name AS disease, dr.name AS drug

question: Which drug is used to treat the most diseases?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) RETURN dr.name AS drug, COUNT(d) AS disease_count ORDER BY disease_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all the drugs and symptoms associated with lung cancer?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom), (d)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "lung cancer" RETURN s.name AS symptom, dr.name AS drug

question: Bệnh viêm gan B có triệu chứng gì?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "hepatitis b" RETURN s.name AS symptom

question: Thuốc nào chữa bệnh trầm cảm?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "depression" RETURN dr.name AS drug

question: Bệnh nào có cả triệu chứng mệt mỏi và khó thở?
expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s1:Symptom), (d)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s2:Symptom) WHERE toLower(s1.name) CONTAINS "fatigue" AND toLower(s2.name) CONTAINS "shortness of breath" RETURN d.name AS disease

question: Có bao nhiêu loại thuốc trong hệ thống?
Thời tiết hôm nay thế nào?
